kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Either Rowan belongs to the Clothiers' Guild or both members of the Hill Ward belong to the Clothiers' Guild (but not both).
Either Aldric goes with Eastcheap, or Bridgegate goes with 6 coins — but not both.
10 coins goes with none of Beatrix, Rowan, or Wulfric.
The Fletcher's levy is higher than both Aldric and the artisan in Millpond.
Between Fletcher and Mason, one goes with Southgate and the other with 8 coins.
If Kingsford does not go with Cooper, then the Carpenter belongs to the Gate Ward.
If Beatrix does not go with Carpenter, then both Mason does not go with Wulfric and Bridgegate goes with 14 coins.

14 coins goes with at most one of Beatrix, Blacksmith, and Eastcheap.
